originalTitle: 'This tree was planted by my ancestor hundreds of years ago and my family settled here'
title: 'This tree was planted by my ancestor hundreds of years ago and my family settled here'
content: Oral history traces a family's roots to a tree planted in the 13th Century in a Ghanaian fishing town.

originalTitle: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
title: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
content: The former leader has not responded to US accusations that he is aiming to destabilise the government.

originalTitle: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
title: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
content: The zero-tariff regime gives China's soft power a boost, but may lead to uneven gains, say analysts.

originalTitle: Ex-Formula One driver turned Paralympic champion Alex Zanardi dies aged 59
title: Ex-Formula One driver turned Paralympic champion Alex Zanardi dies aged 59
content: Zanardi, who lost his legs in a racing crash, was credited with helping transform the perception of disability in Italy.

originalTitle: Japan’s Takaichi pledges deeper energy cooperation with Vietnam
title: Japan’s Takaichi pledges deeper energy cooperation with Vietnam
content: Takaichi signs six agreements with Vietnam, including on technology, agriculture and space, during a trip to Hanoi.

originalTitle: Spirit Airlines begins ‘wind-down’, cancels all flights over fuel crisis
title: Spirit Airlines begins ‘wind-down’, cancels all flights over fuel crisis
content: The collapse of the US-based budget carrier due to a doubling in jet fuel prices will cost thousands of jobs.

originalTitle: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
content: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.

originalTitle: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
content: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.

originalTitle: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
content: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

originalTitle: US consortium takes over Sheffield Wednesday
title: US consortium takes over Sheffield Wednesday
content: Sheffield Wednesday have announced that US consortium Arise Capital Partners has completed a takeover of the club.

title: Watch: Football Focus
content: A preview of the weekend, plus a Scott McTominay interview ahead of the World Cup.

originalTitle: All but safe? Leeds ease 'anxiety' - and increase pressure on others
title: All but safe? Leeds ease 'anxiety' - and increase pressure on others
content: No club has ever been relegated with 43 points at the end of a Premier League season - so have Leeds already done enough to secure survival?
